title: MiniDuncan Client
description: Client-side Modpack designed to be mainly used on SMP's.
body:
### This client was designed with the intent to use on my Minecraft Server (play.miniduncan.net) but can be used on any server that allows the use of a minimap.


#### Client-side means that you can play on the most servers with the mods included in the pack.


## Features/Mods:

#### Performance Mods such as; Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, Entity-Culling, Clumps

#### Shader Support using Iris

#### Built-in shader and texture pack installer

#### Built-in skin manager and swapper

#### 3D audio and reverb using Sound Physics Remastered

#### Item Physics

#### Chat improvements such as; Chat Heads, Compact Chat, Emoji Type

#### Custom Main Menu using FancyMenu (can be disabled by pressing "CTRL, ALT, C" and disabling customisation)

#### Emotes, friends list, cosmetics and world hosting using the ESSENTIAL mod

#### New in-game animations using Eating Animation and NotEnoughAnimations

#### Various GUI improvements such as; Shulker Box Tooltip, Better Mount HUD, Better Statistics Screen
